summary: All features verified and working. Backend (10/10 tests passed): License projections endpoint returns non-zero start_value (was previously $0.00), get_quarter properly imported in admin_routes.py, AI models endpoint returns 300+ models from OpenRouter. Frontend: Login works, AI Training page model selector shows dynamic models with search capability (50 options visible, 13 for 'anthropic' search).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 171 verified the fix for daily projection showing $0.00. Root cause: get_quarter was missing from admin_routes.py imports (line 27). Also verified: (1) GET /api/admin/licenses/{license_id}/projections returns projections with non-zero start_value, (2) GET /api/ai-assistant/models returns 300+ models from OpenRouter with caching, (3) AI Training page (/admin/ai-training) has dynamic model dropdown with search capability showing 50 options at a time. License ID used for testing: 3365cca7-9ed8-40d4-9d73-0b9c43f34e8e

backend_health.notes: GET /api/health returns healthy - server starts without import errors
